Careers

Hundreds of people reimagining
their careers with AeriTek.

Life at AeriTek

Since its inception in 1941, AeriTek is a trailblazer in the commercial refrigeration and foodservice equipment markets, doing business under the Imbera, Minus Forty, QBD and Torrey brands.  AeriTek is redefining performance across retail refrigeration, commercial refrigeration, and foodservice equipment through innovation, efficiency, and intelligent design. We know that we’re only as good as the employees who choose to work for us. We welcome more talented individuals to our North American world-class facilities. We ask for a positive attitude and a willingness to learn. Come be part of a performance culture that delivers!

Why work at AeriTek?
Opportunity

If you’d like to advance your career with a company that thrives on success, then working at AeriTek might be the right fit for you. We favour internal promotions as we recognize our staff’s potential.

Training

You can start on the shop floor and work your way up. You can add to your skill set by attending classes at colleges and universities through our tuition reimbursement program, or by attending our in-house business or manufacturing skills training classes.

Celebrations and Giving

We succeed as a team, so we celebrate as a team! We also give to the community as a team. AeriTek social events
